APIKeyAuthenticationModel.description:

Used by: Generic REST APIs, some cloud services.
All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

APIKeyAuthenticationModel.title: APIKeyAuthenticationModel

AWSAuthenticationModel.description:

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

secret_access_key.description: Key reference for AWS secret access key
secret_access_key.title: Secret Access Key

session_token.description: Key reference for AWS session token (temporary credentials)

role_arn.description: Key reference for AWS IAM role ARN for AssumeRole
role_arn.title: Role Arn

AuthenticationModel.description:
Authentication configuration for cloud provider or integration access.

Specifies authentication method and corresponding credentials as key references.
Keys are resolved at runtime from centralized environment declarations.

CLIAuthenticationModel.description:
CLI-based authentication using local credentials.

Uses existing CLI authentication: az login, gcloud auth, aws configure.
No credential references needed - uses ambient credentials.

use_cli.description: Use local CLI authentication (az, gcloud, aws)
use_cli.title: Use Cli

CLIAuthenticationModel.title: CLIAuthenticationModel

private_key_path.title: Private Key Path

ca_bundle_path.description: Key reference for CA bundle file path

CommonLifecycleModel.description:
Lifecycle phases for common models.
Maps phase names to phase configurations.
Phase names follow pattern: {command}_{action}_{suffix}
Examples: config_clear, config_fetch, deploy_plan_before, deploy_apply_after
CommonLifecycleModel.title: CommonLifecycleModel

CommonLifecyclePhaseModel.description: Model for common lifecycle phase with script validation.
CommonLifecyclePhaseModel.title: CommonLifecyclePhaseModel

ConfigurationComponentModel.description: Model for a topology component configuration.

role.description: Unique role for the topology component.
role.title: Role

uses_module.description: Indicates if the component requires a module.
uses_module.title: Uses Module

is_control.description: Indicates if the component is a control or manager element.
is_control.title: Is Control

required.description: Indicates if the component is required in the topology.
required.title: Required

min_count.description: Minimum number of instances for the component.
min_count.title: Min Count

max_count.description: Maximum number of instances for the component (0 = unlimited).
max_count.title: Max Count

ConfigurationComponentModel.title: ConfigurationComponentModel

ConfigurationDeploymentModel.description:
Model for deployment configuration and schema definition.

Defines required and optional properties that deployments must provide,
similar to how ConfigurationProviderResourceModel defines resource configuration schemas.

Example:
    deployment:
      properties:
        additional_properties: false
        properties:
          environment:
            pattern: "^(dev|test|staging|prod)$"
            required: true
            description: "Deployment environment"
          customer:
            pattern: "^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$"
            required: true
            description: "Customer identifier"
          region:
            pattern: "^[a-z]{2}-[a-z]+(-[0-9]+)?$"
            required: false
            description: "Deployment region"

additional_properties.description: Allow properties not listed in the schema for deployments
additional_properties.title: Additional Properties

properties.description: Deployment properties schema (pattern string or structured field with validation)
properties.title: Properties

ConfigurationDeploymentModel.title: ConfigurationDeploymentModel

ConfigurationLayerModel.description: Definition of a single layer in the deployment hierarchy.

name.description: Layer name (must be valid identifier: lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens)
name.title: Name

description.description: Human-readable description of this layer's purpose
description.title: Description

pattern.description: Regex pattern for validating layer values (e.g., '^[a-z][a-z0-9\-]*$')
pattern.title: Pattern

required.description: Whether this layer must be provided in deployment files
required.title: Required

default.description: Default value if not provided in deployment (only used if required=False)
default.title: Default

ConfigurationLayerModel.title: ConfigurationLayerModel

file.description: Path to logging configuration YAML file (relative to workspace root or absolute)
file.title: File

name.description: Unique name for the configuration resource.
name.title: Name

additional_regions.description: Allow regions not listed in the configuration for this provider
additional_regions.title: Additional Regions

regions.description: List of supported regions for this provider
regions.title: Regions

additional_resources.description: Allow resource types not listed in the configuration for this provider
additional_resources.title: Additional Resources

resources.description: List of supported resource types for this provider
resources.title: Resources

GCPAuthenticationModel.description:

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

GCPAuthenticationModel.title: GCPAuthenticationModel

address.title: Address

IntegrationModel.description:
Model for external integration configuration.

Integrations extend platform capabilities by connecting to external
tools (CLI), services (APIs), or cloud resources (SDKs).

Examples:
    - name: git
      type: git
      capabilities: [repository]
      required: true

    - name: bitwarden
      type: bitwarden
      capabilities: [secrets]
      required: false
      endpoints:
        address: https://bitwarden.com/api

name.description: Unique integration name (used for registry lookup)
name.title: Name

type.description: Integration type (maps to integration class: git, terraform, bitwarden, vault, etc.)
type.title: Type

capabilities.description: Set of capabilities this integration provides: repository, infrastructure, secrets, variables, features, keyvalue, api
capabilities.title: Capabilities

required.description: Whether this integration is required for platform operation
required.title: Required

enabled.description: Whether this integration is enabled (for optional integrations)
enabled.title: Enabled

validation.description: Validation specification for checking integration availability

authentication.description: Authentication configuration for accessing the integration

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle hook specification for API integrations

IntegrationModel.title: IntegrationModel

IntegrationValidationSpecModel.description: Validation specification for integration availability checking.
IntegrationValidationSpecModel.title: IntegrationValidationSpecModel

No credential references needed - uses ambient credentials.

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

client_id.title: Client Id

client_secret.description: Key reference for OAuth2 client secret
client_secret.title: Client Secret

tenant_id.description: Key reference for tenant/directory ID (Azure AD, Okta, etc.)
tenant_id.title: Tenant Id

token_url.description: Key reference for OAuth2 token endpoint URL

authorization_url.description: Key reference for OAuth2 authorization endpoint URL
authorization_url.title: Authorization Url

OAuth2AuthenticationModel.title: OAuth2AuthenticationModel

RepositoryModel.description:
Model for deployment source configuration.

Supports two source types:

BUNDLED:
    - Platform-bundled modules available within the platform itself
    - repository: Platform-relative path ('.' or relative path)
    - reference: Version, tag, or branch identifier
    - source_path: Path to the module from the platform root
    - deploy_path: Optional path to deployment artifacts

GITOPS:
    - Module deployed via GitOps workflow from Git repository
    - repository: Git repository URL (e.g., GitHub, GitLab)
    - reference: Branch, tag, or commit hash
    - source_path: Path to the module within the repository
    - deploy_path: Optional path to deployment artifacts

CONTAINER:
    - Module deployed via container image
    - repository: Container image repository (e.g., Docker Hub, ECR)
    - reference: Image tag or digest
    - source_path: Path to the module within the container image
    - deploy_path: Optional path to deployment artifacts

name.description: Optional name for the source configuration
name.title: Name

type.description: Source type: bundled (platform-bundled) or gitops (Git repository)

repository.description: Source repository or image for the deployment
repository.title: Repository

reference.description: Version/tag/branch or image tag/digest for the deployment
reference.title: Reference

source_path.description: Path to the module configuration or script (not applicable for container type)
source_path.title: Source Path

RepositoryModel.title: RepositoryModel

RepositoryType.description:
Enumeration of supported deployment source types.

BUNDLED: Platform-bundled modules (available within the platform)
GITOPS: GitOps repository to clone from
CONTAINER: Container image source
RepositoryType.title: RepositoryType
